LanguageData.Wula_BrokenPersonality.beginLetter: Due to a severe mental break, {0}'s simulated personality has shattered. Influenced by a master node of the planet's aberrant Wula Empire network, {0} has become one of these aberrant Wula sub-individuals.
LanguageData.Wula_Fake_MechanoidBerserk.label: Brief Loss of Control
LanguageData.Wula_Fake_MechanoidBerserk.baseInspectLi: Mental state: Brief loss of control
